message:
test(fcp-conformance): add split-brain prevention scenario evidence bundle

New SplitBrainArtifactBundle (contract.split_brain_prevention) with
typed replay and state evidence for network partition scenarios where
the mesh must prevent split-brain writes.

Verifies: minority partition isolation, majority partition operation
continuity, cross-partition isolation, and post-heal convergence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
